anomalies.description: Run86 NEW: TP1+trailing path WR=64% avg=+$10.03 (n=160). Prior -$0.34 was TRAILING_STOP close_reason only.
Insights 3, 7, 9 contradict on leverage/WR (57% vs 36% vs 58%). All ACTIVE. No conflict detection.
All trades in both CSVs show duration_h<=0. Hold-time rules cannot be validated.
BTC_LONG WR=32% (n=41). Inverse confidence effect (80+ conf = 19% WR). Gate=80% veto recommended.
10d (57% WR) vs 100d (44.5% WR). 12/17 active rules from 10d.
times_correct=0 across all 17 graduated rules. Tracking bug.
SOL_SHORT gate=100% blocks best 10d edge (64% WR).

new_findings_run86: TRAILING_WR_FRAMING_CORRECTION: TP1+trailing path WR=64% avg=+$10.03, not -$0.34 (prior was TRAILING_STOP close_reason only)
INSIGHT_CONTRADICTION_TRIPLET: Insights 3, 7, 9 all contradict each other on leverage/WR. All ACTIVE.
DURATION_H_BROKEN: All trades in both CSVs show duration_h=0 or negative. Hold-time analysis blind.
BTC_LONG_VETO_REC: WR=32%, all sub-conditions negative, inverse confidence effect worst here. Veto at gate=80% recommended.
